title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
